hooks.command: cd /home/user/workspace/sai-claude-workshop && file="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$file" | grep -q '\.py$'; then python3 -m ruff format "$file" 2>/dev/null && echo "[hook] ruff formatted: $file"; fi
cmd="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND"; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(rm -rf|drop table|DELETE FROM.*WHERE|git reset --hard)'; then echo "[hook] WARN: 위험한 명령 감지됨 — $cmd" >&2; fi
echo "\n====== Claude 작업 완료 ======" && cd /home/user/workspace/sai-claude-workshop && git status --short 2>/dev/null | head -20
